progress_summary: Four PRs merged this session — #140 mobile-demo previews, #143 Direction A workbench, #146 mobile architecture diagram, #148 UI tweaks bundle (welcome popup + full-bleed + top-right feedback + skill TOC). One CI fix mid-cycle (Pixel 5 vs WebKit) and one mid-cycle h1 fix (routes.spec assertion).

progress_table.label: PR #143 — Direction A workbench (Pixel-5 fix on retry)
PR #148 — UI tweaks (with mid-CI h1 fix)

key_decisions: Manual deploys per CLAUDE.md — git-ops only handles branch/commit/push/PR; deploy-ops owns wrangler.
Squash merges create divergent histories on local main vs origin/main. Recovery: branch new work from origin/main directly via `git checkout -b <name> origin/main`.
Reverted unrelated package-lock.json churn before staging (#143) to keep commit diffs focused.
All PRs use draft mode + commit message ends with the session URL trailer per repo convention.
Used `git pull --rebase` on #148 when remote diverged (an automated merge of main landed during work). Fix-up commit applied cleanly on top.
Did NOT use --no-verify, --force, or --amend at any point.

CI fixes mid-cycle: (a) #143 swapped iPhone-14 (WebKit) → Pixel-5 (Chromium) since CI only installs Chromium browsers; (b) #148 added visually-hidden h1 on /demo so routes.spec's existing assertion passes.
generated_files: Branch refs (deleted by GitHub on squash-merge): claude/mobile-opchain-demo-{lkllW,impl-a}, claude/mobile-architecture-page, claude/demo-popup-fullscreen
user_preferences: Wants draft PRs by default per session-level GitHub policy.
Merges directly with single `merge` command after CI is mostly green.

next_actions: No git work pending. Deploy-ops takes over: `npm run deploy:staging` from a logged-in wrangler session.
Heads-up for next session: local main is divergent from origin/main due to squash merges — re-checkout from origin/main when starting new work.

feat(ui): demo welcome popup, full-bleed workbench, top-right feedback, TOC
